channel.title: IL on Detention Pipeline
channel.description: Recent content in IL on Detention Pipeline

item.title: CORNERSTONE DETENTION PRODUCTS, INC — ICE KANE, IL $605,435
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: CORNERSTONE DETENTION PRODUCTS, INC Award ID: 70CMSW22C00000016 Amount: $605,435.00 Description: BUFFALO (BATAVIA) FEDERAL DETENTION FACILITY VIDEO SURVEILLANCE SYSTEM UPGRADE Period: 2022-09-28 to 2023-09-30 Location: KANE, IL (FIPS: 17089)

item.title: RELIANCE RELOCATION SERVICES, INC — ICE COOK, IL $3,008,845

ICE contract.

Recipient: RELIANCE RELOCATION SERVICES, INC Award ID: 70CMSW25FCL000003 Amount: $3,008,844.61 Description: THIS AWARD IS TO DOCUMENT THE ORDERS PLACED BY THE OFFICE OF FINANCIAL MANAGEMENT TO PROCURE RELOCATION SERVICES FOR IMMIGRATION AND CUSTOMS ENFORCEMENT EMPLOYEES. item.title: UNITED TACTICAL SYSTEMS, LLC — ICE LAKE, IL $1,249,204
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: UNITED TACTICAL SYSTEMS, LLC Award ID: 70CMSW26FR0000014 Amount: $1,249,203.75 Description: THE DELIVERY AWARD PROVIDES LESS-LETHAL WEAPON OPTIONS TO ARMED AGENTS FOR CONTROL CROWD DEMONSTRATIONS FOR THE ICE- OFFICE OF FIREARMS AND TACTICAL PROGRAMS AT FORT BENNING, GA. Period: 2026-02-23 to 2026-06-22 Location: LAKE, IL (FIPS: 17097)
